---
filters:
  - abstract-section

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  freeze: false
---

# Abstract

[Abstract — 150 words or fewer. JEL codes and keywords follow.]

**JEL Codes:** [X00, Y00]

**Keywords:** [keyword one, keyword two, keyword three]

# Introduction

# Institutional Background

# Data

# Empirical Strategy

# Results

# Robustness

# Conclusion

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
